enriched_investors.name: ARCH Venture Partners
enriched_investors.description: Chicago-based venture capital firm specializing in early-stage investments in life sciences and biotechnology. Creates and invests in groundbreaking companies commercializing technologies from academic institutions and national laboratories. Focus areas include gene editing, immunotherapy, synthetic biology, and precision medicine.

enriched_investors.name: Hyde Park Venture Partners
enriched_investors.description: Early-stage venture capital firm focused on high-growth mid-continent technology startups. Invests in SaaS, marketplace, and tech-enabled sectors from pre-seed through early Series A. Raised $98M Fund IV.

enriched_investors.name: Chicago Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Seed-stage VC focused on Chicago and Midwest startups. Invests in SaaS, Fintech, and Enterprise software companies with strong technical founders.

enriched_investors.name: M25
enriched_investors.description: Early-stage venture firm investing exclusively in tech startups headquartered in the Midwest. Industry-agnostic approach with 282+ investments. Most active investor in the region since 2015.
enriched_investors.source: Web research - official website, CB Insights

enriched_investors.name: Lightbank
enriched_investors.description: Chicago-based venture capital firm founded by Groupon founders Eric Lefkofsky and Brad Keywell. Invests in disruptive technology companies across healthcare, fintech, and consumer sectors. Full-stack investor from seed to late stage.

enriched_investors.name: Origin Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Early-stage VC investing in AI infrastructure, software, and frontier technology. Known for early investments in Grubhub, Cameo, and Tock. Recently raised $140M sixth fund focused on AI and defense tech.
enriched_investors.source: Web research - official website, CB Insights

enriched_investors.name: Pritzker Group Venture Capital
enriched_investors.description: Venture capital investment firm helping entrepreneurs build technology companies at every stage. Founded by Tony and J.B. Pritzker with permanent capital base. Invests in Series A and B across technology spectrum.

enriched_investors.name: Jump Capital
enriched_investors.description: Thesis-driven venture fund focused on Series A investments in FinTech, IT/Data Infrastructure, and B2B SaaS. Backed by Jump Trading founders. Investing from $350M seventh fund with emphasis on crypto ecosystem.

enriched_investors.name: OCA Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Chicago-based VC founded in 1999 focusing on equity investments in technology and highly-scalable services. Specialized in fintech, insurtech, and blockchain/Web3 infrastructure. Partner with UChicago Booth VC Lab program.

enriched_investors.name: Chicago Early Growth Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Founded in 2019 investing in pre-seed and seed-stage startups. Preference for Chicago-based companies or founders connected to Chicago universities. Portfolio of 66+ companies across Enterprise, Consumer, and Vertical SaaS.

enriched_investors.name: Chingona Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Chicago-based early-stage VC founded by Samara Mejia Hernandez investing in pre-seed companies led by founders with unique backgrounds. Focus on fintech, future of work, future of learning, foodtech, and healthtech. Fund II closed at $52M.

enriched_investors.name: Bessemer Venture Partners
enriched_investors.description: Top-tier venture capital firm investing from seed to late growth stages. Focus on cloud computing, enterprise software, healthcare, fintech, AI/ML, and consumer internet. 150+ IPOs and 420+ portfolio companies.

enriched_investors.name: Index Ventures
enriched_investors.description: European venture capital firm backing companies from Seed to IPO. Focus on AI, ML, business applications, fintech, healthcare, and open source. Portfolio includes Revolut, Roblox, Scale AI, Notion, and Wiz.

enriched_investors.name: Khosla Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Early-stage VC working with companies in AI, climate/sustainability, healthcare, fintech, and frontier technology. First VC to invest in OpenAI. Strong focus on cleantech with 70+ investments in the sector.

enriched_investors.name: New Enterprise Associates
enriched_investors.description: One of world's largest venture capital firms with $25B+ committed capital. Invests across all stages in healthcare and technology sectors. 1,000+ investments with 250+ IPOs including Databricks, ByteDance, Cloudflare.

enriched_investors.name: Founders Fund
enriched_investors.description: San Francisco-based VC founded by Peter Thiel investing in revolutionary technologies. Focus on defense tech, AI, biotech, and aerospace. First institutional investor in SpaceX and Palantir. $17B+ AUM.

enriched_investors.name: Drive Capital
enriched_investors.description: Columbus, Ohio-based VC investing in founders across the Midwest 'Driveway' region. Focus on early to growth-stage companies in tech, healthcare, AI, and robotics. Early investor in Duolingo and Root Insurance.

enriched_investors.name: Cultivation Capital
enriched_investors.description: St. Louis-based VC managing a family of funds focused on early-stage investing. Industries include life sciences, health tech, agriculture tech, and geospatial tech. Most active early-stage venture firm in North America.

enriched_investors.name: Flyover Capital
enriched_investors.description: Kansas City-based early-stage VC investing in underestimated tech leaders in the Flyover region. Focus on B2B technology in finance, insurance, logistics, real estate, and cybersecurity.

enriched_investors.name: KCRise Fund
enriched_investors.description: Only VC firm focused specifically on Kansas City region. Invests in early-stage B2B technology companies from pre-seed to Series A. $90M+ AUM with 48 portfolio companies across supply chain, fintech, cybersecurity, and healthtech.

enriched_investors.name: Harlem Capital
enriched_investors.description: Diversity-focused VC on mission to invest in 1,000 diverse founders over 20 years. Based in New York, investing post-revenue in tech-enabled startups led by underrepresented founders. Fund II closed at $134M.

enriched_investors.name: Female Founders Fund
enriched_investors.description: Seed-stage venture fund investing exclusively in female-founded companies. Focus on ecommerce, web-enabled products, marketplaces, and platforms. Portfolio includes Zola, Tala, and BentoBox.

enriched_investors.name: Precursor Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Pre-seed and seed stage VC founded by Charles Hudson. Acts as 'institutional friends & family' backing first-time entrepreneurs. Generalist fund making 75-100 investments per fund. Portfolio includes Shippo and The Athletic.

enriched_investors.name: Spark Capital
enriched_investors.description: Multi-stage VC with $12B+ AUM across Boston, SF, and NY. Generalist fund investing in consumer internet, enterprise software, gaming, crypto, fintech, and AI. Early investor in Twitter, Slack, Discord, and Affirm.

enriched_investors.name: Root Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Seed-stage VC composed of practicing engineers investing in deep tech. Focus on hardware, robotics, developer tools, and manufacturing tech. Lab-like office with machine shops supporting technical founders.

enriched_investors.name: Coinbase Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Corporate VC arm of Coinbase investing in crypto and Web3 ecosystem. 629+ investments across DeFi, NFTs, layer 1 protocols, and Web3 infrastructure. Portfolio includes Arbitrum, Uniswap, and OpenSea.

enriched_investors.name: Greycroft
enriched_investors.description: VC firm with $3B+ AUM focusing on AI-driven software, sustainability technologies, and consumer brands. Investments in foundational AI models, enterprise applications, and beauty/personal care brands.

enriched_investors.name: Alumni Ventures
enriched_investors.description: VC firm with $1.5B AUM from 11,000 investors. Co-invests with top VCs like a]16z, Benchmark, and Y Combinator. Focused Funds span AI, health, sports, and climate. Portfolio of 1,400+ companies.

enriched_investors.name: 8VC
enriched_investors.description: Early-stage VC founded by Joe Lonsdale with $6B+ AUM. Focus on defense, healthcare, logistics, and manufacturing. Operates venture studio 'Build' program co-founding companies. Early investor in Anduril and Oculus.

enriched_investors.name: Salesforce Ventures
enriched_investors.description: Corporate VC arm of Salesforce with $6B+ deployed across 630+ startups. Focus on cloud infrastructure, security, AI, and enterprise applications. 75 unicorns in portfolio including Anthropic, Databricks, and Snowflake.

metadata.confidence_scoring_methodology: 95 = Verified from official website + multiple sources; 90 = Verified from official website only; 85 = Verified from 2+ third-party sources; 80 = Single third-party source; 75 = Estimated based on similar firms
